---
title: "Recollections of a Page at the Court of Louis XVI. Edited, from the French, by Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Recollections of a Page at the Court of Louis XVI. Edited, from the French, by Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1873
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London : Hurst and Blackett.

### Notes

Probably translated by Julian Bargus Yonge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
